claim: The Neptune-9 buoy array is a distributed oceanographic sensor network monitoring temperature, salinity, and current velocity across a designated section of open ocean.

supporting_evidence.quote: The Neptune-9 buoy array is a distributed oceanographic sensor network monitoring temperature, salinity, and current velocity across a designated section of open ocean.

claim: Each buoy carries a sealed instrument payload, a satellite communication module, and a solar-and-wave hybrid power system designed to operate unattended for years at a time.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each buoy carries a sealed instrument payload, a satellite communication module, and a solar-and-wave hybrid power system designed to operate unattended for years at a time.

claim: Each buoy's instrument payload includes a conductivity-temperature-depth sensor, an acoustic Doppler current profiler, and a set of surface meteorological sensors measuring wind speed and barometric pressure.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each buoy's instrument payload includes a conductivity-temperature-depth sensor, an acoustic Doppler current profiler, and a set of surface meteorological sensors measuring wind speed and barometric pressure.

claim: The acoustic Doppler current profiler measures current velocity at multiple depths simultaneously by timing the Doppler shift of acoustic pulses reflected off particles suspended in the water column.

supporting_evidence.quote: The acoustic Doppler current profiler measures current velocity at multiple depths simultaneously by timing the Doppler shift of acoustic pulses reflected off particles suspended in the water column.

claim: Each buoy draws power from a combined solar panel and wave-energy harvesting system, backed by a battery bank sized to sustain several weeks of operation without any charging input at all.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each buoy draws power from a combined solar panel and wave-energy harvesting system, backed by a battery bank sized to sustain several weeks of operation without any charging input at all.

claim: The buoy's onboard power management system prioritizes sensor operation and satellite transmission over any non-essential subsystem whenever stored energy drops below a configured threshold.

supporting_evidence.quote: The buoy's onboard power management system prioritizes sensor operation and satellite transmission over any non-essential subsystem whenever stored energy drops below a configured threshold.

claim: Each buoy transmits a compressed data packet via a low-earth-orbit satellite uplink at scheduled intervals, typically every four hours under normal operating conditions.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each buoy transmits a compressed data packet via a low-earth-orbit satellite uplink at scheduled intervals, typically every four hours under normal operating conditions.

claim: Data received at the consortium's ground station is validated against expected value ranges before being published to the array's public data feed, flagging any reading outside plausible physical bounds for manual review.

supporting_evidence.quote: Data received at the consortium's ground station is validated against expected value ranges before being published to the array's public data feed, flagging any reading outside plausible physical bounds for manual review.

claim: Marine biofouling, the accumulation of algae, barnacles, and other organisms on submerged buoy surfaces, is one of the most persistent maintenance challenges for any long-term ocean deployment.

supporting_evidence.quote: Marine biofouling, the accumulation of algae, barnacles, and other organisms on submerged buoy surfaces, is one of the most persistent maintenance challenges for any long-term ocean deployment.

claim: Heavy biofouling on the conductivity-temperature-depth sensor's intake can bias salinity and temperature readings, which is why the array's design includes a copper-alloy anti-fouling housing around the most sensitive sensor surfaces.

supporting_evidence.quote: Heavy biofouling on the conductivity-temperature-depth sensor's intake can bias salinity and temperature readings, which is why the array's design includes a copper-alloy anti-fouling housing around the most sensitive sensor surfaces.

claim: The mooring anchor is lowered first, followed by the tether and finally the buoy itself, a sequence chosen to minimize the risk of tether entanglement during deployment.

supporting_evidence.quote: The mooring anchor is lowered first, followed by the tether and finally the buoy itself, a sequence chosen to minimize the risk of tether entanglement during deployment.

claim: Each buoy undergoes a full functional check, confirming sensor readings and satellite connectivity, before the deployment vessel departs the station.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each buoy undergoes a full functional check, confirming sensor readings and satellite connectivity, before the deployment vessel departs the station.

claim: The Neptune-9 buoy array was deployed in 2018, with the full complement of 340 buoys reaching their assigned mooring positions by the end of that year's deployment season.

supporting_evidence.quote: The Neptune-9 buoy array was deployed in 2018, with the full complement of 340 buoys reaching their assigned mooring positions by the end of that year's deployment season.

claim: The array covers a designated ocean region spanning roughly 900,000 square kilometers, with buoys spaced to provide meaningful spatial coverage of current and temperature variation across that area.

supporting_evidence.quote: The array covers a designated ocean region spanning roughly 900,000 square kilometers, with buoys spaced to provide meaningful spatial coverage of current and temperature variation across that area.

claim: As of the consortium's most recent public status report, 312 of the original 340 buoys remain actively reporting, with the remainder retired after reaching the end of their serviceable lifetime.

supporting_evidence.quote: As of the consortium's most recent public status report, 312 of the original 340 buoys remain actively reporting, with the remainder retired after reaching the end of their serviceable lifetime.

claim: The array's public data feed has accumulated over 40 million individual sensor readings since deployment began, spanning temperature, salinity, current velocity, and surface meteorological measurements.

supporting_evidence.quote: The array's public data feed has accumulated over 40 million individual sensor readings since deployment began, spanning temperature, salinity, current velocity, and surface meteorological measurements.

claim: Average satellite transmission success rate across the array is 97.3 percent of scheduled windows, with the remainder attributed to temporary satellite visibility gaps or buoy-side power conservation.

supporting_evidence.quote: Average satellite transmission success rate across the array is 97.3 percent of scheduled windows, with the remainder attributed to temporary satellite visibility gaps or buoy-side power conservation.

claim: The consortium's ground station processes incoming data continuously, publishing validated readings to the public feed within approximately fifteen minutes of successful satellite transmission.

supporting_evidence.quote: The consortium's ground station processes incoming data continuously, publishing validated readings to the public feed within approximately fifteen minutes of successful satellite transmission.

claim: In 2016, before the array's full production deployment, the consortium's engineering team ran a limited experimental test of the array's control-plane software using an early, pre-production subset of buoys.

supporting_evidence.quote: In 2016, before the array's full production deployment, the consortium's engineering team ran a limited experimental test of the array's control-plane software using an early, pre-production subset of buoys.

claim: That experimental test evaluated whether a Byzantine fault tolerant consensus protocol could coordinate configuration updates across the buoy subset over the same intermittent satellite links used for ordinary sensor data.

supporting_evidence.quote: That experimental test evaluated whether a Byzantine fault tolerant consensus protocol could coordinate configuration updates across the buoy subset over the same intermittent satellite links used for ordinary sensor data.

claim: The experimental test used a small subset of pre-production hardware over the array's characteristic satellite link budget, well before the array's full 2018 deployment, to validate the control-plane software independent of the eventual production sensor payload.

supporting_evidence.quote: The experimental test used a small subset of pre-production hardware over the array's characteristic satellite link budget, well before the array's full 2018 deployment, to validate the control-plane software independent of the eventual production sensor payload.

claim: Each sensor type carried by a Neptune-9 buoy has a distinct measurement range and reporting precision, summarized below.

supporting_evidence.quote: Each sensor type carried by a Neptune-9 buoy has a distinct measurement range and reporting precision, summarized below.

claim: These specifications are supplied by the sensor manufacturers and independently verified by the consortium during each buoy's pre-deployment functional check.

supporting_evidence.quote: These specifications are supplied by the sensor manufacturers and independently verified by the consortium during each buoy's pre-deployment functional check.

claim: Before a buoy leaves the deployment vessel, the crew completes the following functional check.

supporting_evidence.quote: Before a buoy leaves the deployment vessel, the crew completes the following functional check.

claim: A buoy failing any single check is held back for repair rather than deployed, even if doing so delays that station's overall deployment schedule.

supporting_evidence.quote: A buoy failing any single check is held back for repair rather than deployed, even if doing so delays that station's overall deployment schedule.

claim: Watanabe and Sato's 長期海洋観測ブイにおける省電力設計 (2013) provides an early power-budget analysis that directly informed Neptune-9's solar-and-wave hybrid power system design.

supporting_evidence.quote: Watanabe and Sato's 長期海洋観測ブイにおける省電力設計 (2013) provides an early power-budget analysis that directly informed Neptune-9's solar-and-wave hybrid power system design.

claim: Morozova's Биообрастание морских измерительных буёв и методы его предотвращения (2015) formalizes the biofouling mitigation approaches the array's sensor housings implement.

supporting_evidence.quote: Morozova's Биообрастание морских измерительных буёв и методы его предотвращения (2015) formalizes the biofouling mitigation approaches the array's sensor housings implement.

claim: Let S be expected solar input, W be expected wave-harvester input, and C be total daily consumption across sensors, onboard processing, and satellite transmission; the buoy operates sustainably whenever S + W >= C on average across a rolling multi-day window.

supporting_evidence.quote: Let S be expected solar input, W be expected wave-harvester input, and C be total daily consumption across sensors, onboard processing, and satellite transmission; the buoy operates sustainably whenever S + W >= C on average across a rolling multi-day window.

claim: During extended low-input periods, when S + W falls below C, stored battery capacity B depletes at a rate of C - (S + W) per day, and the power management system reduces C, primarily by cutting transmission frequency, once B falls below a configured reserve threshold.

supporting_evidence.quote: During extended low-input periods, when S + W falls below C, stored battery capacity B depletes at a rate of C - (S + W) per day, and the power management system reduces C, primarily by cutting transmission frequency, once B falls below a configured reserve threshold.

claim: The Neptune-9 program began in 2013 as a single prototype buoy deployed near shore, close enough to a research station for frequent physical access, specifically to validate the sensor payload and power system design before committing to any larger deployment.

supporting_evidence.quote: The Neptune-9 program began in 2013 as a single prototype buoy deployed near shore, close enough to a research station for frequent physical access, specifically to validate the sensor payload and power system design before committing to any larger deployment.

claim: A second prototype phase, beginning in 2015, moved a small number of buoys further offshore specifically to validate satellite telemetry and biofouling mitigation under conditions closer to the eventual production deployment region.

supporting_evidence.quote: A second prototype phase, beginning in 2015, moved a small number of buoys further offshore specifically to validate satellite telemetry and biofouling mitigation under conditions closer to the eventual production deployment region.

claim: In 2016, ahead of the full production deployment, the engineering team also ran the limited consensus-protocol control-plane experiment described elsewhere in this document, using a small subset of pre-production hardware to validate whether a more sophisticated coordination protocol was worth the added complexity for the production array's actual requirements.

supporting_evidence.quote: In 2016, ahead of the full production deployment, the engineering team also ran the limited consensus-protocol control-plane experiment described elsewhere in this document, using a small subset of pre-production hardware to validate whether a more sophisticated coordination protocol was worth the added complexity for the production array's actual requirements.

claim: This recap restates the array's core monitoring purpose for readers skimming only the overview section.

supporting_evidence.quote: This recap restates the array's core monitoring purpose for readers skimming only the overview section.

claim: The specific sensors responsible for each measurement are described in full in the sensor payload section rather than repeated here.

supporting_evidence.quote: The specific sensors responsible for each measurement are described in full in the sensor payload section rather than repeated here.
